rationale: All four scheduled task creation events (A0, EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) correspond to well-known, legitimate software components: Npcap's watchdog task (A0) pointing to a standard Npcap installation path, Mozilla Firefox's default browser agent (EV-001) authored by Mozilla, and two Aurora-Agent update tasks (EV-002, EV-003) authored by Nextron Systems — a reputable endpoint security vendor. The Npcap task (A0) is created by the machine account (WORKGROUP\host-01-$), consistent with an installer running under SYSTEM context, and its action references the standard Npcap CheckStatus.bat. No suspicious command-line arguments, unusual paths, encoded payloads, or unknown authors are present across any of the events, and no corroborating process execution or network telemetry suggesting abuse is included in the package.
